Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Malice]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Ghostwater ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 19''' — Malice has brood.}}

== Uncrowned ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 7''' — Malice is represented by the largest star in the Akura family emblem.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 11''' — Malice has at least two children participating in the tournament.}}

== Wintersteel ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 2''' — Malice melted into shadows.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 4''' — Malice is a character who once noticed Eithan Arelius.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 4''' — Malice provides protection to Eithan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 7''' — Malice has a daughter who could potentially petition her mother for transport.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 7''' — Malice found the situation important enough to fuel a pathway for transportation.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 8''' — Malice created mental and spiritual spaces within the pages of the Book of Eternal Night.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 9''' — Malice stopped the Bleeding Phoenix by herself.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 10''' — Akura Grace resembles a younger version of Malice.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 11''' — Malice will be fighting against the cults.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 13''' — Malice's intervention would tip the balance of conflict.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 15''' — Malice is a Monarch.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 15''' — Malice could make Eithan's life miserable.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 16''' — Malice is Mercy's mother and a Monarch.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 16''' — Malice considers the techniques in the Book of Eternal Night to be powerful enough for a future Monarch.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 18''' — Malice is a person who could have sent Lindon and Mercy to Sky's Edge.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 18''' — Malice has prepared for the fight.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 21''' — Malice is a Monarch who wears dark blue instead of her usual purple.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 21''' — Malice would not have allowed the current situation if Fury did not have a way out.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 22''' — Malice would not allow her final representative to give in to temptation.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 22''' — Malice is the only remaining fighter for her family.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 22''' — Malice is willing to sacrifice Fury, Pride, and Mercy for the good of her family.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 25''' — Malice has youngest children that Calan is tasked to kill.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 26''' — Malice has plans regarding Fury.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 26''' — Malice asked Yerin what her signature was.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 27''' — Malice has children who are participating in the battle.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 28''' — Malice was fighting the Dragon King.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 28''' — Malice launched a technique that filled half the world with flying skulls of shadow.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 28''' — Malice used a bow the size of a tower that shone blue, purple, and green.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 28''' — Malice's attack would be an inconvenience for Reigan Shen.}}

== Bloodline ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 2''' — If Mercy succeeds Malice, she will stay in this world for the rest of her life.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 2''' — Malice owes Yerin a prize.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 13''' — Malice's exploits are myths in the Akura clan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 13''' — Mercy holds an impression of Malice.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 14''' — Malice is standing beside Yerin.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 16''' — Malice would drive off the Wandering Titan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 16''' — Malice uses Forged blue madra arrows.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 16''' — Malice wears amethyst armor.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 17''' — Malice is steering her opponent away from the labyrinth entrance.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 17''' — Malice wears armor the size of the Titan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 17''' — Malice uses shadow madra to create webs.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 17''' — Malice fought the Phoenix to a standstill for three days previously.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 17''' — Malice wears purple armor.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 18''' — Malice is someone who might send Mercy away.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 19''' — Malice had not commanded Dreadgods directly.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 21''' — Malice is accompanied by a cloud of violet essence.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 21''' — Malice is a Monarch who values useless conversation.}}

== Reaper ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 2''' — Malice has a daughter.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 4''' — Eithan wonders if Malice has a grudge against him.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 7''' — Malice is one of the two remaining pillars of the Akura family with Charity.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 9''' — Malice had a certain attitude toward Mercy during the Uncrowned King tournament.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 10''' — Malice felt power erupting from the western labyrinth.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 18''' — Malice is attacking Yerin.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 18''' — Malice is the virtue Mercy is named after.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 20''' — Malice is a potential future opponent in the labyrinth.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 23''' — Lindon may eventually have to swear an oath to Malice.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 24''' — Malice is the Queen of the Akura clan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 25''' — Malice is present above the labyrinth.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 25''' — Malice has a wide and crazed smile.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 25''' — Malice has purple eyes.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 25''' — Malice has a son named Fury.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 25''' — Malice can use spiritual pressure.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 26''' — Malice finds herself in the World of Night with Mercy in her arms.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 27''' — Malice broke her way out of the World of Night.}}

== Dreadgod ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 3''' — Malice sponsors camps in Sacred Valley.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 5''' — Malice informed Lindon about the relationship between Dreadgods and Monarchs.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 6''' — Malice uses shadow to transport herself.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 6''' — Malice's bloodline armor bleeds away to purple essence.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 6''' — Malice has black hair.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 7''' — Malice's prop is mentioned in relation to Lindon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 8''' — Malice founded Moongrave over four hundred years ago.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 10''' — Enraging Malice is a concern for Charity.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 12''' — Malice's preferred aesthetic is foreboding purple-and-black.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 12''' — Malice released Lindon from the consequences of his pain.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 15''' — Malice is a powerful figure whose strike could rival the power gathered in Moongrave's launcher constructs.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 15''' — Malice uses a bow that can transform into a staff.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 15''' — Malice's attacks involve arrows that turn the sky black.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 15''' — Malice uses an Enforcer technique that manifests a royal specter.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 16''' — Malice's spiritual perception passed over the city.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 16''' — Malice is fighting a battle against the Silent King and his horde.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 17''' — Malice is a person Yerin imagined fighting.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 18''' — Malice uses shadow fragments that slice the soul.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 18''' — Malice can multiply one arrow into a thousand.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 18''' — Malice has the willpower and spiritual resistance of a Monarch.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 18''' — Malice is pelted by a barrage from the reinforced army.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 19''' — Malice focused on Lindon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 19''' — Malice's wrath was cold as night.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 21''' — Malice is a Soulsmith.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 21''' — Malice is a person Lindon feared might target the Arelius family and Twin Star Sect.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 21''' — Malice has not yet plundered the Dragon Monarch's desert vault.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 22''' — Malice is a Monarch who was expected at the meeting with Sha Miara.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 23''' — Malice is observing from one of her floating cloud fortresses.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 23''' — Malice uses the Dark Tide Incantation.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 23''' — Malice has been slaying dragons for centuries.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 23''' — Malice uses bloodline armor.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 23''' — Malice uses a cloud fortress.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 23''' — Malice uses an amethyst hand.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 23''' — Malice uses a bow that shoots arrows of ice and shadow madra.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 23''' — Malice can command the Way to transport her fortress.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 23''' — Malice uses a crystalline bow.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 23''' — Malice uses arrows and blades of shadow.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 23''' — Malice uses a small black ball to create a pocket space via shadow madra.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 23''' — Malice's black ball is no bigger than Suriel’s marble.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 23''' — Malice can summon armor that hovers where her heart should be.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 23''' — Malice has a crystal hand emerging from her chest.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 23''' — Malice is part of the Akura family.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 23''' — Malice uses a staff.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 23''' — Malice possesses Silent King madra.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 23''' — Malice has authority.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 23''' — Malice can produce constructs from her soulspace.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 24''' — Malice is currently fighting.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 24''' — Malice is attempting to transport Mercy away.}}

== Waybound ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 2''' — Yerin once fought Malice with black sword-arms.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 2''' — Malice's treatment may have left wounds on Mercy.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 3''' — Mercy had fought Malice.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 7''' — Malice's will and memories are contained within the Book of Eternal Night.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 8''' — Malice usually carries a bow.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 9''' — Malice used her armor and called her bow during the attack.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 9''' — Malice's technique uses hunger madra.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 9''' — Malice blasted a cold star through the air.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 9''' — Malice's arrow was layered with many techniques and condensed power.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 10''' — Malice treated Mercy poorly.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 10''' — Malice launches a volley of arrows.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 11''' — Malice used hunger echoes of Malice and Reigan Shen to fend off Striker techniques.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 11''' — Malice showed amusement during the battle.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 12''' — Yerin remembers Malice treating her like a worm on a hook.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 13''' — Malice learned to imitate the Shadestep technique when she became a Sage.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 15''' — Malice is a character whom Larian expects will be jealous of the bow.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 18''' — Larian mentions wanting Malice's bow.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 20''' — Malice's instincts warned Mercy against attaching a mind-spirit to her soul.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 20''' — Malice is a source of hatred that Mercy felt.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 21''' — Malice felt an intrusion into her void space when Lindon punched into her shadow.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 24''' — Malice is seated on a throne with shadowy hair.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 25''' — The Book of Eternal Night was meant to contain Malice’s ideal Path.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 26''' — Malice occupies an audience chamber in a dark castle.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 26''' — Malice does not have a mind-spirit.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 26''' — Malice can release her Netherworld Empress.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 26''' — Malice threatened that after she was finished with her daughter, no one would remember her existence.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 26''' — Malice used a solidified sword of shadow to attack Mercy.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 26''' — Malice released shadow that tore apart her own floating castle.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 27''' — Malice has the defenses of an earth artist, the subtlety of a shadow artist, the strength of a sword artist, and the flexibility of a Soulsmith.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 27''' — Malice has ruled most of a continent for hundreds of years.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 27''' — Malice uses an ice-blue bow.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 27''' — Malice opens a pitch-black void space.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 27''' — Malice can open her void key.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 27''' — Malice wears armor.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 28''' — Malice knowingly allowed the Dreadgods to exist to preserve her own power.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 29''' — Malice's Path included the Crown Icon, the Shadow Icon, and the Strength Icon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 29''' — Malice named her granddaughter Charity.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 29''' — Malice named family members Justice and Pride.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 30''' — Malice has a daughter whose armor grew to Dreadgod size.}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 3''' — Yan Shoumei knows better than to be caught by Malice.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 14''' — The Blood Sage was instructed to kill Malice’s children.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 14''' — Malice asks if Eithan is single.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
